baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: The Quant's inversion mechanic on this asset also generates +1 cash in any year where the double-hit fires, before resolution. Non-Quant: +2 loan cap if GMI this year is negative.

flavourText: Structure is what you call complexity when you're selling it.
